title: High-stakes summit in China, U.S. response to Hantavirus outbreak, Pentagon releases UFO files
Pastor who attended “secret UFO disclosure meeting” saw images of ‘translucent beings’ that chilled him to the bone
description: According to a report from the Daily Mail, several Christian leaders who attended confidential briefings on impending UFO revelations are sounding alarms that the released materials could align with end-times warnings in Scripture. Pastor Joseph Zupetz and evangelist Tony Merkel were among a small group of faith influencers invited to a private gathering in a remote mountainous Airbnb in Tennessee in February. There, former military personnel and investigators into non-human intelligence shared details about upcoming government disclosures of UAPs, reverse-engineered craft, and encounters with otherworldly entities.

title: UAP data released: Astrophysicist breaks down the first batch of declassified records | FOX 10 Talks
description: Harvard Astrophysicist Avi Loeb joins FOX 10 Talks to discuss the latest shift in the government’s handling of "Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena" (UAPs). Following recent directives from the Trump administration to declassify secret data, the first batch of records has been released—but does it hold the "smoking gun" the world is looking for? In this interview, Avi Loeb breaks down: The Rebrand: Why the Pentagon moved from "UFO" to "UAP" to remove the "crackpot" stigma. The May 8th Disclosure: What was actually in the 162 records and why some images (like the Apollo moon lights) might have a simple explanation. The Galileo Project: How scientists are bypassing government secrecy to find "outliers" in our sky. The Spielberg Connection: Avi reveals his conversation with Steven Spielberg regarding his upcoming film Disclosure Day.

title: Government UFO file release renews interest in southern Ohio sightings
UFO files mention bright lights, orbs
description: SIOUX FALLS, S.D. (KELO) -- South Dakota has had at least 433 reported sightings of unidentified flying objects (UFOs) since 1897, according to the National UFO Reporting Center (NUFORC) website. The reporting sighting in 1897 was an "object descends and follows locomotive." The website credits the book "SDUFO: A Case History" (2004) by Greg Nedved [...]
